description: Legal record (#18). Loan contract. Dated: Monday, 29 Iyyar 1467 Seleucid. Abū l-Khayr b. Nājī owes 2.25 dinars to Abū l-Murajjā Sālim al-Ṣayrafī b. Abū Saʿd, to be repaid within 3 months. He also owes 3 dinars to Bū Isḥāq Ibrāhīm, 1 dinar to be paid each month. The record was left incomplete. (Information from Goitein's notes.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
